name: Ada
description: Ada — No-code AI customer service platform for automating support conversations across chat and voice.

seo.title: Ada — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Ada: Ada — No-code AI customer service platform for automating support conversations across chat and voice.

when_to_use: Automating tier-1 customer support without writing code
Deflecting repetitive tickets with an AI chat widget
Deploying voice-based support flows for phone channels
Integrating no-code chatbot into Zendesk or Salesforce

pros: No-code flows usable by CX managers
Native voice and chat in one platform
Prebuilt connectors for Zendesk and Salesforce
cons: Per-resolution pricing gets steep at scale
Limited outside of support use cases
review.verdict: Mature pick for enterprise CX teams that want to avoid building their own agent stack.
review.best_for: Enterprise support orgs automating tier-1 chat and voice deflection
review.not_for: Engineering teams wanting code-level control over agent behavior

lock_in.reason: Conversation flows and training data tied to Ada's proprietary builder

developer_experience.reason: JS SDK and webhooks; no-code interface dominates
